cost-estimation.desc: FTE-month estimation (NEVER prices). Effort inductors. Scope drivers. Confidence ranges (optimistic/expected/pessimistic). [EXPLICIT]

risk-assessment.desc: Risk identification across 7 categories (technical, operational, security, scalability, data, team, timeline). Severity x likelihood. [EXPLICIT]

stakeholder-mapping.desc: Influence/interest matrix. RACI matrix. Communication plan. Power/interest grid. Stakeholder registry. [EXPLICIT]

team-topology.desc: Conway's Law analysis, team interaction modes, cognitive load assessment, organizational design. [EXPLICIT]
